case_title: LOVEMAN, BEN et al VS BERTAIN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BERTAIN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,050.00 FILED BY LOVEMAN, BEN LOVEMAN, RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT BERTAIN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO BERTAIN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOVEMAN, BEN LOVEMAN, RYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERTAIN PROPERTY MANAGEMENT $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $850.00, IN MAKING ITS DECISION, THE COURT HAS CONSIDERED THE EVIDENCE & TESTIMONY & WEIGHED THE EQUITIES- INCLUDING CONSIDERATION OF PLFTS BREACH OF SUBJECT LEASE & DEFT'S NON-COMPLIANCE W. CIVIL CODE 1950.5 THE COURT FINDS THAT PLFT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT WAS $2250; & DEFT IS ENTITLED TO DEDUCT REASONABLE SUM FOR COSTS ASSOCIATED W/ RELEASING AND PREPARING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT TO RYAN LOVEMAN RETURNED UNDELIVERED. NO FORWARDING ADDRESS.
RETURNED MAIL FROM POST OFFICE SENT TO BEN LOVEMAN-NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-13-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-12-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE ON DEFENDANT.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO RYAN LOVEMAN RETURNED UNDELIVERED. NO FORWARDING ADDRESS.
